title: Add idempotency for checkout payment retries
description: Customers should not be double charged when checkout retry requests are sent after a timeout or network failure.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Requests with the same Idempotency-Key return the original payment result instead of creating a second charge.
A missing Idempotency-Key is rejected for checkout payment creation.
Automated tests cover duplicate retry behavior and missing-key validation.

technicalConstraints: Do not store raw card data.
Use the existing payment repository boundary.
securityExpectations: No secrets, tokens, authorization headers, card data, or raw payment payloads should be logged.
performanceExpectations: Idempotency lookup should not add more than one database query per checkout request.
testExpectations: Add retry tests for duplicate payment requests.
Add validation tests for missing Idempotency-Key.
